Refer to figure.
Using the loadsheet on the annex, determine the Underload and the difference between the Maximum Structural TOM and the Actual TOM. The Underload is..

options.a: 4770 kg and the difference is 7170 kg.
options.b: 3770 kg and the difference is 3770 kg.
options.c: 3770 kg and the difference is 7170 kg.
options.d: 3670 kg and the difference is 3770 kg.
